features.description: Unit tests for pure helper functions in main.rs (backup_name_from_command, resolve_backup_name, backup_name_required, map_cli_location, map_cli_list_format, merge_skip_projections)

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: OUTPUT=$(cargo test --bin chbackup -- test_backup_name_from_command test_resolve_backup_name test_backup_name_required test_map_cli_location test_map_cli_list_format test_merge_skip_projections 2>&1); PASSED=$(echo "$OUTPUT" | sed -n 's/.*\([0-9][0-9]*\) passed.*/\1/p' | tail -1); FAILED=$(echo "$OUTPUT" | sed -n 's/.*\([0-9][0-9]*\) failed.*/\1/p' | tail -1); FAILED=${FAILED:-0}; if [ "$FAILED" = "0" ] && [ "$PASSED" -ge 20 ] 2>/dev/null; then echo "PASS: $PASSED passed, 0 failed"; else echo "FAIL: passed=$PASSED failed=$FAILED"; exit 1; fi
layers.fail_message: Expected at least 20 main.rs tests to pass with 0 failures

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Test-only code, no runtime binary behavior change
